_comment: Cast for the Brief prototype. 'real: true' = actual Highlight people from LinkedIn screenshots / research (names & roles factual; their mock dialogue is invented). 'real: false' = invented for the scenario (Dani + recruiting candidates). IDs are referenced as speaker/sender/assignee across all Mocks/*.jsonl streams.

colleagues.name: Sergei Sorokin
colleagues.relationToDani: Manager. ex-Discord VP Product. Recruited Dani.
colleagues.note: Real. Vision quotes in dossier are verbatim-public; his mock messages here are invented.

colleagues.name: Parris Khachi
colleagues.relationToDani: Peer (eng counterpart). ex-Discord Senior Eng Manager. Dani's main partner on launch blockers.
colleagues.note: Real (Parris Khachi). Different function from Dani: he owns eng, she owns product.

colleagues.name: Sam Eckert
colleagues.relationToDani: Peer. Design partner on launch surface polish.
colleagues.note: Real (LinkedIn: 'Head of Design at Highlight AI'). Also the assignment contact (sam.eckert@highlight.ing).

colleagues.name: Sarah Wu
colleagues.relationToDani: Peer. Runs ops; coordinates recruiting logistics + launch ops.
colleagues.note: Real (LinkedIn: 'ops @ highlight AI | forbes 30u30 | ex-vc & ib').

colleagues.name: Adrian Casares
colleagues.relationToDani: Eng. Owns backend pieces of launch-critical work.

colleagues.name: Julian Curtis-Ziff
colleagues.relationToDani: Eng lead. Heavy on Connections / MCP integration work.
colleagues.note: Real (LinkedIn: 'Lead Engineer @ Highlight AI'). Last name truncated in screenshot ('Curtis-Zi…') — 'Curtis-Ziff' is a plausible completion; flag as inferred.

colleagues.name: Michael Jelly
colleagues.relationToDani: AI eng. Owns summarization / model quality for Daily Summaries.

colleagues.name: Vasudev Menon
colleagues.relationToDani: Design eng. Bridges Sam's design and the front-end.

colleagues.name: Samantha Taube
colleagues.relationToDani: Fractional brand/launch lead. Dani's partner on external messaging until the Founding Product Marketer is hired.
colleagues.note: Real (LinkedIn: 'Driving brand development and product launches as Fractional…').

candidates.name: Naomi Feldman
candidates.background: ex-Notion PMM, led a 0→1 launch; strong narrative taste. Top of Dani's list to own launch messaging.
candidates.note: Invented candidate. Open role is real (on Highlight careers page).

candidates.name: Dr. Wei Zhang
candidates.background: ex-research lab + applied AI at a consumer-scale company. Being courted for summarization/agent quality leadership.
candidates.note: Invented candidate. Open role is real.

candidates.name: Marcus Bell
candidates.stage: Recruiter screen passed; Dani coffee chat optional
candidates.background: Full-stack generalist, fast shipper, has built MCP integrations before.
candidates.note: Invented candidate. Open role is real.

externalContacts.name: Priya Raman
externalContacts.context: Briefed under embargo on the launch; wants an exec quote + product access.
externalContacts.note: Invented. Stands in for the press relationship around a real-style launch.

externalContacts.name: Theo Lang
externalContacts.context: Early team design partner trialing Highlight's team features; source of a launch testimonial.

externalContacts.name: Cursor Billing
externalContacts.context: Automated billing receipt. Low-signal noise the brief should filter.

externalContacts.name: SF Health MyChart
externalContacts.context: Automated medical notification. Source of the personal-privacy sensitive item that bled into work capture.
externalContacts.note: Invented no-reply sender; fictional health system.
